revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 2일]][[wuu:正月初二]][[za:Ndwencieng ngoenz co'ngeih]][[zh-classical:正月初二]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月初二]][[zh:正月初二]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 2|qq=January 2}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}}, the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|qid=Q232026|lt=Empress Jitō|1=Empress Jitō}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|695|en|695|qid=Q23484|lt=695|1=695}} {{ill|April 19|en|April 19|qid=Q2523|lt=April 19|1=April 19}}) – An emissary from Silla was sent to Japan by the Silla king.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://example.com|title=Reference needed|accessdate=2021-03|qq=}}</ref> * {{ill|Engen|en|Engen|qid=Q1194159|lt=Engen|1=Engen}} 1st year/{{ill|Kenmu|en|Kenmu|qid=Q1193970|lt=Kenmu|1=Kenmu}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1336|en|1336|qid=Q6028|lt=1336|1=1336}} {{ill|April 13|en|April 13|qid=Q2498|lt=April 13|1=April 13}}) – In the battle of Tatarahama, after being expelled from Kyoto, {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|qid=Q297107|lt=Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji}} defeated Kikuchi Takefusa at Tatarahama in Chikuzen and advanced eastward. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1840|en|1840|qid=Q7619|lt=1840|1=1840}} {{ill|April 4|en|April 4|qid=Q2508|lt=April 4|1=April 4}}) – Under the appointment of {{ill|Mizuno Tadakuni|en|Mizuno Tadakuni|qid=Q2975848|lt=Mizuno Tadakuni|1=Mizuno Tadakuni}}, the office of Kanjō Bugyō was assumed by the new appointee, who became the Kitamachi Bugyō.
== Births == * [[Tendoku (Japan)|Tendoku]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|959|en|959|qid=Q23750|lt=959|1=959}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|qid=Q2499|lt=April 12|1=April 12}}) – {{ill|Emperor En'yū|en|Emperor En'yū|qid=Q374104|lt=Enyū Tennō|1=Emperor En'yū}}, the 64th Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|991|en|991|qid=Q24097|lt=991|1=991}}). * {{ill|Ryakuō|en|Ryakuō|qid=Q1146182|lt=Ryakuō|1=Ryakuō}} 1st year/{{ill|Kenmu|en|Kenmu|qid=Q1193970|lt=Kenmu|1=Kenmu}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1338|en|1338|qid=Q6044|lt=1338|1=1338}} {{ill|March 23|en|March 23|qid=Q2445|lt=March 23|1=March 23}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Kōgon|en|Emperor Go-Kōgon|qid=Q555465|lt=Go-Kōgen Tennō|1=Emperor Go-Kōgon}}, the 4th Emperor of the Northern Court (died {{ill|1374|en|1374|qid=Q6269|lt=1374|1=1374}}). * {{ill|Kannin|en|Kannin|qid=Q1193951|lt=Kansei|1=Kannin}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1791|en|1791|qid=Q7784|lt=1791|1=1791}} {{ill|April 4|en|April 4|qid=Q2508|lt=April 4|1=April 4}}) – {{ill|Anseki Gensan|ja|安積艮斎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anseki Gensan|1=Asaka Gonsai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q4071127}}, a Confucian scholar (died {{ill|1861|en|1861|qid=Q7693|lt=1861|1=1861}}).
== Deaths == * [[Chishō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1179|en|1179|qid=Q19698|lt=1179|1=1179}} {{ill|April 10|en|April 10|qid=Q2502|lt=April 10|1=April 10}}) – {{ill|Shunkan|en|Shunkan|qid=Q73539|lt=Shunkwan|1=Shunkan}}, a monk (died {{ill|1143|en|1143|qid=Q19617|lt=1143|1=1143}}). * {{ill|Meitoku|en|Meitoku|qid=Q1145032|lt=Meitoku|1=Meitoku}} 3rd year /{{ill|Genchū|en|Genchū|qid=Q1146236|lt=Genchū|1=Genchū}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1392|en|1392|qid=Q6382|lt=1392|1=1392}} {{ill|March 25|en|March 25|qid=Q2454|lt=March 25|1=March 25}}) – {{ill|Hosokawa Yoriyuki|en|Hosokawa Yoriyuki|qid=Q1139739|lt=Hosokawa Yorinobu|1=Hosokawa Yoriyuki}}, a military commander and official (born {{ill|1329|en|1329|qid=Q5894|lt=1329|1=1329}}). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1582|en|1582|qid=Q6719|lt=1582|1=1582}} {{ill|March 25|en|March 25|qid=Q2454|lt=March 25|1=March 25}}) – {{ill|Nishina Morinobu|en|Nishina Morinobu|qid=Q4168137|lt=Ninashina Morinobu|1=Nishina Morinobu}}, a military commander (born {{ill|1557|en|1557|qid=Q6595|lt=1557|1=1557}} ?).
== Anniversaries and Annual Events == * {{ill|Hatsuyume|en|Hatsuyume|qid=Q1588971|lt=First Dream|1=Hatsuyume}} * {{ill|First Cargo|de|Erste Fracht|ja|初荷|zh|初货|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/First Cargo|1=First Cargo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11396565}} * {{ill|First Sale|de|Erster Verkauf|ja|初売|zh|初卖|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/First Sale|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 初売り|1=hatsuuri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11396450}} * {{ill|First Day of Work|de|Erster Working Days|ja|仕事始め|zh|开工|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/First Day of Work|1=Shigotohajime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11377609}} * {{ill|Kakizome|en|Kakizome|qid=Q600698|lt=First Calligraphy|1=Kakizome}} * {{ill|Princess's First Appearance|de|Erster Auftritt der Prinzessin|ja|姫始め|zh|公主首秀|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Princess's First Appearance|1=Himehajime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11447386}}
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|1|1|3|12|2|2|1|0102|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
